programme.desc: Death Note - T01E03

programme.title: 2007. Light, conhecido mundialmente como Kira, prova a extensão dos poderes do Death Note. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E04

programme.title: 2007. Soichiro Yagami exige uma reunião em pessoa com L quando ele descobre que ele secretamente levou agentes do FBI para o Japão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E05

programme.title: 2007. Light se reune com uma mulher no departamento de polícia, pois tem uma mensagem importante para o Kira. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E06

programme.title: 2007. Light usa o Death Note para tentar se livrar de uma mulher que poderia ter levado para a prisão. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E07

programme.title: 2007. L coloca microfones e câmeras nas casas dos membros do grupo especial, incluindo a casa de Yagami, mas Light dá um passo a frente. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E08

programme.title: 2007. Os assassinatos continuam, e L começa a suspeitar do comportamento perfeito de Light que então decide investigar por conta própria. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Alexandre Drumond, Ana Lucia, Charles Manuel, Jorge Vasconcellos, José Leonardo, Sergio Cantu Diretor: Tetsuro Araki
programme.desc: Death Note - T01E09

programme.desc: Beyblade G-Revolution - T03E19

programme.title: 2003. A etapa egípcia do Campeonato do Mundo culmina com a partida final, destacando a Dinastia F contra a Revolução BBA. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Mitsuo Hashimoto
programme.desc: Beyblade G-Revolution - T03E20

programme.title: 2003. Tyson está sentindo a pressão de ser campeão do mundo. Apesar do aviso de Hiro, uma equipe de televisão o segue por um dia, gravando todos os seus movimentos. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Mitsuo Hashimoto
programme.desc: Beyblade G-Revolution - T03E21

programme.title: 2003. Com Lee perdendo para Tala no início da partida, White Tiger X é um jogo perdido, e Kai agora se prepara para lutar pelos Blitzkrieg Boys. programme.title: 2016. Valt Aoi e seus amigos procuram por batalhas de Beyblade mais intensas a cada chance que têm. O diretor dá uma bronca neles quando fazem uma bagunça no ginásio da escola. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fumihiro Okabayashi, Junya Enoki, Marina Inoue Diretor: Seiji Mizushima
programme.desc: Beyblade Burst - T01E01

programme.title: 2016. A vitória recente de Valt o deixa com a sensação de invencibilidade, mas Shu o adverte de que a grandeza exige disciplina e treinamento. Uma revanche não-oficial contra Rantaro força VAlt a considerar o conselho de Shu. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fumihiro Okabayashi, Junya Enoki, Marina Inoue Diretor: Seiji Mizushima
programme.sub-title: Kerbeus: O Cão de Guarda Do Submundo!
programme.desc: Beyblade Burst - T01E02

programme.title: 2016. Valt e seus amigos passam pelas primeiras rodadas do Torneio Distrital. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fumihiro Okabayashi, Junya Enoki, Marina Inoue Diretor: Seiji Mizushima
programme.desc: Beyblade Burst - T01E03

programme.title: 2023. O Canhão Satélite do Figurão 5 ataca os monstros de Kaiba a partir do espaço sideral, onde nenhum dos monstros de Kaiba pode alcançar! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Kunihisa Sugishima, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Toru Yamada
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T03E12

programme.title: 2023. Kaiba chega no santuário de Noah para resgatar Mokuba, mas Mokuba quer ficar com Noah! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Kunihisa Sugishima, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Toru Yamada
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T03E13

programme.title: 2023. Noah dá aos Cinco Figurões uma última chance de se redimirem em um duelo de dois contra cinco, em que Yugi e Joey enfrentam todos os Cinco Figurões! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Kunihisa Sugishima, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Toru Yamada
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T03E14

programme.title: 2023. Os Cinco Figurões concentram seu ataque em Joey, esperando eliminá-lo, para forçar Yugi a duelar sozinho contra toda a força formidável deles! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Kunihisa Sugishima, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Toru Yamada
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T03E15

programme.title: 2023. Os Cinco Figurões invocam um dragão todo-poderoso que já derrotou Joey, Mai e Mokuba em um mundo virtual alternativo. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Kunihisa Sugishima, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Toru Yamada
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T03E16

programme.title: 2023. É um duelo pelo controle da KaibaCorp, no qual Noah enfrenta Kaiba! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Kunihisa Sugishima, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Toru Yamada
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T03E17

programme.title: 2023. A Arca de Shinato de Noah rouba monstros para dentro de seu forte para usá-los como uma muralha impenetrável de servos! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Kunihisa Sugishima, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Toru Yamada

programme.title: 2009. À medida que as finais contra Zeus se aproximam, o mesmo acontece com a expectativa e o medo de Raimon. A equipe está trabalhando duro, mas o nível a ser atingido parece estar além do alcance deles. Eles chegarão a tempo da final. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.title: 2009. É isso, chegou a final do Nacional. O Zeus Junior High venceu rapidamente e nada que o Raimon Junior High faça tenha efeito neles. Eles são realmente deuses. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.title: The Monuments Men
programme.desc: During World War II, a group of art scholars and other experts infiltrates enemy territory to retrieve stolen masterpieces before the Nazis destroy them. Starring George Clooney, Matt Damon, Bill Murray.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: Ellen and Brian attend Beltane, a festival to celebrate the coming of summer, where sins are burned away by the needfire; Henry struggles to hold onto his hope and Julia loses allies when secrets come out.

programme.title: The Witches of Eastwick
programme.desc: Three witchy New England women innocently conjure up the perfect man, who is much more than he seems. Starring Jack Nicholson, Cher, Susan Sarandon.

programme.title: Blindness
programme.desc: A doctors wife is one of the few individuals immune to a strange epidemic that causes people to lose their eyesight. Starring Julianne Moore, Mark Ruffalo, Alice Braga.

programme.title: Splice
programme.desc: An experiment goes horribly wrong when two scientists (Adrien Brody, Sarah Polley) use human DNA to create a hybrid creature. Starring Adrien Brody, Sarah Polley, Delphine Chaneac.

programme.title: Hector and the Search for Happiness
programme.desc: A search by a disillusioned psychiatrist for the key to his happiness takes him around the world on a journey. Starring Simon Pegg, Toni Collette, Rosamund Pike.

programme.title: Nelly and Simon: Mission Yeti
programme.desc: A private eye and a university research assistant search for the abominable snowman in the Himalayas. Starring Sylvie Moreau, Guillaume Lemay-Thivierge, Rachid Badouri.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit and his three sisters enjoy spending their days in Mr. McGregors vegetable garden. A battle of wills soon breaks out as McGregor hatches scheme after scheme to get rid of Peter -- a rabbit who proves to be a worthy and wily opponent. Starring James Corden, Fayssal Bazzi, Domhnall Gleeson.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit 2: The Runaway
programme.desc: Venturing out of the garden, Peter finds himself in a world where his mischief is appreciated. However, when his makeshift family risks everything to come looking for him, Peter must figure out what kind of bunny he wants to be. Starring James Corden, Rose Byrne, Domhnall Gleeson.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Members of the mysterious and spooky Addams Family -- Gomez, Morticia, Pugsley, Wednesday, Uncle Fester and Grandma -- encounter a shady TV personality who despises their eerie hilltop mansion. Starring Oscar Isaac, Charlize Theron, Chloë Grace Moretz.

programme.title: The Addams Family 2
programme.desc: Hoping to get closer as a family, Gomez, Morticia and the rest of the Addams clan embark on an adventurous road trip in a hideous and humongous camper. Starring Oscar Isaac, Charlize Theron, Chloë Grace Moretz.

programme.title: Moonstruck
programme.desc: An Italian-American widow (Cher), engaged to a reticent suitor, falls in love with his brother (Nicolas Cage). Starring Cher, Nicolas Cage, Vincent Gardenia.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: A recent college graduate lands a job working for a famous and diabolical editor of a New York fashion magazine. Starring Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Adrian Grenier.

programme.title: Father of the Bride
programme.desc: A harried patriarch (Steve Martin) faces separation anxiety, exorbitant costs and more as he prepares for his daughters (Kimberly Williams) wedding. Starring Steve Martin, Diane Keaton, Kimberly Williams-Paisley.

programme.title: Clueless
programme.desc: A Beverly Hills teen (Alicia Silverstone) plays matchmaker for teachers, transforms a bad dresser (Brittany Murphy) and examines her own existence. Starring Alicia Silverstone, Stacey Dash, Brittany Murphy.

programme.title: The Fabelmans
programme.desc: Young Sammy Fabelman falls in love with movies after his parents take him to see "The Greatest Show on Earth." Armed with a camera, Sammy starts to make his own films at home, much to the delight of his supportive mother. Starring Michelle Williams, Paul Dano, Seth Rogen.

programme.title: One Week
programme.desc: A dire medical diagnosis prompts a young man (Joshua Jackson) to search for meaning in his life via a cross-country trek across Canada on a vintage motorcycle. Starring Joshua Jackson, Liane Balaban, Chris Benson.

programme.title: Real Time
programme.desc: A killer gives a gambler an hour to live. Starring Randy Quaid, Jay Baruchel, Ella Chan.

programme.title: Being Julia
programme.desc: In 1938 London a theatrical actress (Annette Bening) devises an elaborate scheme against the social climber who used her. Starring Annette Bening, Jeremy Irons, Bruce Greenwood.

programme.title: Long Life, Happiness and Prosperity
programme.desc: A child (Valerie Tian) unwittingly wreaks havoc around her when she tries magic spells to find a new husband for her divorced, overworked mother (Sandra Oh). Starring Sandra Oh, Valerie Tian, Tsai Chin.

programme.title: Cooking With Stella
programme.desc: A woman cooks for clients and tries to keep her thefts of food and money from being discovered. Starring Don McKellar, Seema Biswas, Lisa Ray.

programme.title: How the West Was Fun
programme.desc: Twin girls (Mary-Kate Olsen, Ashley Olsen) hatch a plan to save an old womans dude ranch from shady developers. Starring Mary-Kate Olsen, Ashley Olsen, Martin Mull.

programme.title: The Muppets Take Manhattan
programme.desc: Kermit and company try to take their variety show to Broadway, while Miss Piggy grows jealous of a friendly waitress. Starring Jim Henson, Frank Oz, Dave Goelz.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Louisa May Alcotts classic story of the lives, loves and triumphs of four sisters in Civil War-era New England. Starring Winona Ryder, Gabriel Byrne, Trini Alvarado.

programme.title: 13 Going on 30
programme.desc: A girl makes a wish on her thirteenth birthday, and wakes up the next day as a thirty-year-old woman. Starring Jennifer Garner, Mark Ruffalo, Judy Greer.

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: The All-American Girls Professional Baseball League begins in 1943 with a major-league has-been as a manager. Starring Tom Hanks, Geena Davis, Madonna.

programme.title: Big Fish
programme.desc: A young journalist (Billy Crudup) searches for the truth behind the tall tales told by his ailing father (Albert Finney). Starring Ewan McGregor, Albert Finney, Billy Crudup.

programme.title: The Imitation Game
programme.desc: Genius British logician and cryptologist Alan Turing (Benedict Cumberbatch) helps crack Germanys Enigma Code during World War II but is later prosecuted by his government for illegal homosexual acts. Starring Benedict Cumberbatch, Keira Knightley, Matthew Goode.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: Ellen and Brian attend Beltane, a festival to celebrate the coming of summer, where sins are burned away by the needfire; Henry struggles to hold onto his hope and Julia loses allies when secrets come out.

programme.title: 28 Days Later
programme.desc: Survivors (Cillian Murphy, Noah Huntley, Naomie Harris) try to stay a step ahead of vicious, virus-infected humans that have overrun London. Starring Cillian Murphy, Noah Huntley, Naomie Harris.

programme.title: 28 Weeks Later
programme.desc: As the U.S. Army tries to restore order, a carrier of rage virus enters London and reinfects the populace. Starring Robert Carlyle, Rose Byrne, Jeremy Renner.

programme.title: The Imaginarium of Dr Parnassus
programme.desc: After a carnival troupe saves his life, a man (Heath Ledger) agrees to help its immortal leader (Christopher Plummer) collect five souls and win a bet with the devil. Starring Heath Ledger, Christopher Plummer, Verne Troyer.

programme.title: Matthias and Maxime
programme.desc: Two young mens lifelong friendship is tested when they act in a movie whose script calls for them to kiss each other. Starring Gabriel DAlmeida Freitas, Xavier Dolan, Harris Dickinson.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: While an old friend of Magnus, a pouched abnormal named Jimmy, is handing over a fire elemental to the Sanctuary team, they are attacked by a gang of criminal abnormals from Chicago; the situation presents a lot of mysteries to be solved quickly.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: When rich youngsters begin to disappear after an apparent death and then come back to life, the trail leads Will and Magnus to a drug clinic in Mexico run by Nicola Tesla.

programme.title: Clara
programme.desc: In a race to find intelligent life in the universe, an astronomer and his freethinking research assistant make an inexplicable discovery that changes how they see the world -- and each other. Starring Patrick J. Adams, Troian Bellisario, Kristen Hager.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie
programme.desc: An ordinary LEGO figurine Emmet, thought to be the key to saving the world, is accompanied by a fellowship of strangers embarking on a quest to vanquish a tyrant bent on a terrible deed. Starring Chris Pratt, Will Ferrell, Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: Little Monsters
programme.desc: A nice monster called Maurice (Howie Mandel) lures a boy (Fred Savage) through the floor, into an underworld of prankish goons. Starring Fred Savage, Howie Mandel, Daniel Stern.

programme.title: Maudie
programme.desc: From childhood to her deathbed, a woman experiences love, loss and discrimination. Starring Patricia Ann Hoffman, Meberate Brooks, Kayla Monnot-Edwards.

programme.title: Snowtime!
programme.desc: Children (Angela Gallupo, Lucinda Davis, Sonja Ball) in a small village learn valuable life lessons when they form two teams for a massive snowball fight. Starring Angela Galuppo, Lucinda Davis, Sonja Ball.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: Peter Parkers quest to solve his parents disappearance puts him on a collision course with a scientists deadly alter ego, the Lizard. Starring Andrew Garfield, Emma Stone, Rhys Ifans.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Greater conflict lies ahead for Spider-Man, with the emergence of Electro, a foe far more powerful than he is and the return of his old friend, Harry Osborn. Starring Andrew Garfield, Emma Stone, Jamie Foxx.

programme.title: John Wick
programme.desc: New York City becomes the bullet-riddled playground of a former assassin (Keanu Reeves) as he hunts down the Russian mobsters who destroyed everything he held dear. Starring Keanu Reeves, Michael Nyqvist, Alfie Allen.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: When new surgical nurse Mia arrives at the hospital, she quickly turns her charm on married colleagues, Charlotte and Jacob, who cant help but feel unsettled when she unexpectedly moves into the house next door.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: After a wild night out, Charlotte tries to distance herself from Mia; Charlottes ex, Leo, returns to the hospital and at the fundraising ball, his and Jacobs mutual dislike is palpable; Mias reaction to a death at the hospital raises eyebrows.

programme.title: Passchendaele
programme.desc: Sgt. Dunne (Paul Gross) returns to war to look after a nurses brother. Starring Caroline Dhavernas, Gil Bellows, Paul Gross.

programme.title: Goon: Last of the Enforcers
programme.desc: After one too many injuries, hockey player Doug Glatt leaves the game and becomes an insurance salesman at the urging of his pregnant wife. His retirement is short-lived as he laces up the skates once again to try and reclaim his former glory. Starring Seann William Scott, Liev Schreiber, Alison Pill.

programme.title: Miss Pacific Fleet
programme.desc: Two stranded chorus-girls (Joan Blondell, Glenda Farrell) earn money to make it back to New York by entertaining sailors. Starring Joan Blondell, Glenda Farrell, Warren Hull.

programme.title: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: A wrestler, a rebel, a brain, a beauty and a shy girl share Saturday detention in a Chicago high school. Starring Emilio Estevez, Molly Ringwald, Judd Nelson.

programme.title: Sixteen Candles
programme.desc: A girl turning 16 likes another girls guy (Michael Schoeffling) and feels nobody cares about her birthday. Starring Molly Ringwald, Anthony Michael Hall, Michael Schoeffling.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: A bumbling relative gets the chance to redeem himself when hes called upon to look after his brothers three children. Starring John Candy, Amy Madigan, Jean Louisa Kelly.

programme.title: Andy Hardys Blonde Trouble
programme.desc: Twin blondes (Lee Wilde) get college man Andy (Mickey Rooney) in hot water with the dean at the judges (Lewis Stone) alma mater. Starring Lewis Stone, Mickey Rooney, Lee Wilde.

programme.title: The Affairs of Dobie Gillis
programme.desc: Dobie (Bobby Van) goes to college, dates Pansy (Debbie Reynolds), horses around, blows up the chemistry lab. Starring Debbie Reynolds, Bobby Van, Hans Conried.

programme.title: Alice in Movieland
programme.desc: Alice wins a free trip to Hollywood and dreams about her arrival. Starring Joan Leslie, Nana Bryant, Clara Blandick.

programme.title: Goodbye, Mr. Chips
programme.desc: The life of a shy English schoolmaster (Peter OToole) brightens when he falls in love with a music-hall singer (Petula Clark) who becomes his wife. Starring Peter OToole, Petula Clark, Michael Redgrave.

programme.title: Tarzan and the She-Devil
programme.desc: Lyra (Monique van Vooren) and her gang chase Jane (Joyce Mackenzie), burn the tree house and capture the ape man (Lex Barker). Starring Lex Barker, Joyce Mackenzie, Monique van Vooren.

programme.title: The Last Installment: A Crime Does Not Pay Subject
programme.desc: Clyde spends his time in jail reading about Bull Moose Brannigan. Starring Walter Sande, Cameron Mitchell, William "Bill" Phillips.

programme.title: Blondie of the Follies
programme.desc: Two poor New Yorkers (Marion Davies, Billie Dove) become chorus girls and rivals for the same rich man (Robert Montgomery). Starring Marion Davies, Robert Montgomery, Billie Dove.

programme.title: Angels in the Outfield
programme.desc: The Pittsburgh Pirates manager (Paul Douglas) sees hope after a newswoman (Janet Leigh) reports a girl saw angels on their side. Starring Paul Douglas, Janet Leigh, Keenan Wynn.

programme.title: Captain Horatio Hornblower
programme.desc: C.S. Foresters British naval hero (Gregory Peck) woos the Duke of Wellingtons sister (Virginia Mayo) and fights in the Napoleonic wars. Starring Gregory Peck, Virginia Mayo, Robert Beatty.

programme.title: Passage to Marseille
programme.desc: Five convicts escape from Devils Island to join the Free French bombing squadron fighting the Nazis during WWII. Starring Humphrey Bogart, Michèle Morgan, Claude Rains.

programme.title: Them!
programme.desc: Bug experts (Edmund Gwenn, Joan Weldon), a state trooper (James Whitmore) and an FBI agent track giant mutant ants from New Mexico to Los Angeles. Starring James Whitmore, Edmund Gwenn, Joan Weldon.

programme.title: Rodan
programme.desc: A bug-eating pterodactyl flies out of a coal mine and wrecks Japan with sonic booms. Starring Kenji Sahara, Yumi Shirakawa, Akihiko Hirata.

programme.title: Caged
programme.desc: An innocent (Eleanor Parker) lands in a womens prison with crude inmates and a big matron called Evelyn (Hope Emerson). Starring Eleanor Parker, Agnes Moorehead, Hope Emerson.

programme.title: The Ritz
programme.desc: A tubby Ohio garbageman flees from his hit-man brother-in-law to a gay Turkish bath in Manhattan. Starring Jack Weston, Rita Moreno, Jerry Stiller.

programme.title: Petulia
programme.desc: A divorced doctor (George C. Scott) has a hectic affair with a kooky married woman (Julie Christie) in 1960s San Francisco. Starring Julie Christie, George C. Scott, Richard Chamberlain.

programme.title: The Scarlet Coat
programme.desc: A Colonial major (Cornel Wilde) turns traitor to catch a British spy (Michael Wilding) plotting with Benedict Arnold. Starring Cornel Wilde, Michael Wilding, Anne Francis.

programme.title: Diane
programme.desc: Asked by Francis I to tutor his son, Diane de Poitiers becomes the future King Henry IIs mistress in the 1500s France. Starring Lana Turner, Pedro Armendáriz, Roger Moore.

programme.title: Caged
programme.desc: An innocent (Eleanor Parker) lands in a womens prison with crude inmates and a big matron called Evelyn (Hope Emerson). Starring Eleanor Parker, Agnes Moorehead, Hope Emerson.

programme.title: George Washington Slept Here
programme.desc: Unhandy New Yorkers (Jack Benny, Ann Sheridan) move into a Pennsylvania fixer-upper bought by the wife for its history. Starring Jack Benny, Ann Sheridan, Charles Coburn.

programme.title: Two Weeks With Love
programme.desc: A teenager (Jane Powell) flirts with a foreigner (Ricardo Montalban) while staying with her parents and sister at a Catskills resort. Starring Jane Powell, Ricardo Montalban, Louis Calhern.

programme.title: The Prince and the Showgirl
programme.desc: A Balkan prince regent (Laurence Olivier) courts a Milwaukee chorus girl (Marilyn Monroe) during the 1911 coronation in London. Starring Marilyn Monroe, Laurence Olivier, Sybil Thorndike.

programme.title: Splendor in the Grass
programme.desc: In 1925 Kansas, a teenage girl suffers an emotional breakdown following a platonic love affair. Beattys film debut. Starring Natalie Wood, Warren Beatty, Pat Hingle.

programme.title: The Bank Dick
programme.desc: A man inadvertently foils a robbery and is awarded the job of bank guard, forcing him to face a real holdup. Starring W.C. Fields, Cora Witherspoon, Una Merkel.

programme.title: Never Give a Sucker an Even Break
programme.desc: A tipsy comedian (W.C. Fields) has an idea for a movie, in which he falls out of a plane into a mythical country. Starring W.C. Fields, Gloria Jean, Margaret Dumont.

programme.title: International House
programme.desc: A doctor (George Burns), nurse (Gracie Allen) and professor (W.C. Fields) join the madcap fuss over an inventors television in a Chinese hotel. Starring W.C. Fields, George Burns, Gracie Allen.

programme.title: Nanook of the North
programme.desc: An Inuit and his family visit a trading post, spear fish, catch a walrus, and build an igloo. Starring Berry Kroeger.

programme.title: Moana: A Romance of the Golden Age
programme.desc: Filmmaker Robert J. Flaherty spends a year living in a village in Samoa documenting the life of the villagers.

programme.title: Tie Me Up! Tie Me Down!
programme.desc: A former mental patient (Antonio Banderas) in Spain finds his porno-star dream girl (Victoria Abril) and ties her to her bed. Starring Victoria Abril, Antonio Banderas, Lolas Leon.

programme.title: Barrios altos
programme.desc: A divorced single mother enters a world of confusion when her friend leaves a cryptic message shortly before being murdered. Starring Victoria Abril, Carmen Conesa, Mario Gas.

programme.title: The Toy Wife
programme.desc: A 19th-century Louisiana woman (Luise Rainer) has the attention of one suitor (Robert Young) but marries another (Melvyn Douglas). Starring Luise Rainer, Robert Young, Melvyn Douglas.

programme.title: Mills Blue Rhythm Band
programme.desc: The band performs at a rent party.

programme.title: Intruder in the Dust
programme.desc: An attorney in a small Southern town reluctantly takes on the case of a black farmer accused of murder. Starring David Brian, Claude Jarman, Juano Hernandez.

programme.title: The Romance of Rosy Ridge
programme.desc: A mysterious Civil War veteran (Van Johnson) courts a Missouri farmers (Thomas Mitchell) daughter (Janet Leigh) amid postwar unrest. Starring Van Johnson, Janet Leigh, Thomas Mitchell.

programme.title: Stars in My Crown
programme.desc: Man of God Josiah Gray (Joel McCrea) is determined to bring religion to the people of Walesburg, a dusty southern town still healing from the Civil War. Starring Joel McCrea, Ellen Drew, Dean Stockwell.

programme.title: Highway 301
programme.desc: A network of armed robbers successfully gets away with several million dollars before the law can stop them. Starring Steve Cochran, Virginia Grey, Gaby Andre.

programme.title: The Phenix City Story
programme.desc: The son (Richard Kiley) of an ill-fated anti-crime crusader (John McIntire) tries to clean up his notorious Alabama hometown. Starring John McIntire, Richard Kiley, Kathryn Grant.

programme.desc: Jordan tries comedy as a way of overcoming stage fright; Vanessa makes a documentary about her home life.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - Black People Do Therapy
programme.desc: Talking about problems.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - North Carolina AAndT State University
programme.desc: The NCAT HBCU marching band, also known as the the Blue and Gold Marching Machine, provides an inside look into how they prepare on their journey to the Battle of the Bands.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - Tennessee State University
programme.desc: The TSU HBCU marching band shares pivotal components of their secrets to success from the eyes of the band members and their leaders; they prepare for the Battle of the Bands.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - South Carolina State University
programme.desc: The SC State HBCU marching band, Marching 101, share their success story from a small town; they share their intimate journey to the Battle of the Bands.

programme.title: 6 Minutes to Glory: The HBCU Band Experience - Norfolk State University
programme.desc: The NSU HBCU marching band, also known as The Spartan Legion Marching Band, gives a history lesson on how it all began and the untold story of their road to success, from rehearsals to the main stage at the Battle of the Bands.

programme.title: The Ideal Husband
programme.desc: A couple are happily awaiting their first child until a secret threatens to destroy their happiness.

programme.title: Move When The Spirit Says Move: The Legacy of Dorothy Foreman Cotton
programme.desc: Exploring the work of a bold yet unsung civil rights activist and educator and those carrying on her legacy.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Calvin Goes to Work
programme.desc: Michael reluctantly hires Vanessas dad, Calvin, but his work ethic leaves Michael searching for a way to fire him; Claire gets Franklin to help her with a science paper.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Romantic Night
programme.desc: Michaels plan for a romantic evening with Jay goes awry when Junior accidentally cancels their hotel reservations.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - The Director
programme.desc: Michael records over a video of Kadys first steps, then enlists Franklins help, before home-movie night, to re-enact the moment.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - The Maid
programme.desc: While Jay is away, Michael hires a maid (Betty White) whose painstaking attention to the familys every need leaves Jay feeling a little threatened.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Hand Model
programme.desc: Michael is recruited as a hand model during Claires modeling audition; Franklin feels threatened by Kadys friendship with Rachel and decides to do something about it.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - What Do You Know?
programme.desc: A question-and-answer game reveals that the couples may not know as much about their significant others as they thought.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Childcare Class
programme.desc: After Michael fails a child-care course for grandparents, Vanessa and Jr. refuse to let him baby-sit his grandchild.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Secret Lover Mann
programme.desc: When Lorraine discovers racy notes, new perfume, and sneaky behavior, she thinks Toni is cheating on Daniel; Daniel goes to war with his next-door neighbor.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Whos That Mann
programme.desc: When Daniel is cleaning out his old car, he finds clues about who his real father is; Daniels ex-wife tries to help DJ pass his drivers test.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Take Me to the Mann
programme.desc: The new Lieutenant arrives at the precinct, and everyone soon learns that she and Hobbs have a romantic past; A cable installer confuses Toni for singer Tamela Mann.

programme.title: Mann And Wife - Pressured By the Mann
programme.desc: Toni faces a moral dilemma when the administrators at her school decide to change the students standardized test results; Hobbs mother brings her new fiance for a visit.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Almost Dirty Dancing
programme.desc: Regina teaches a television producer how to dance; a famous photographer wants to take pictures of Lovita.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) goes overboard in her quest to win a choir competition. With Steve Harvey.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Steve Dont Get Nun
programme.desc: Steves old flame visits for a benefit, but shocking news prevents the rekindling of their relationship.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - All That Jazz
programme.desc: Steve gets writers block while trying to compose a song for Black History Month; Lovita wants Cedrics forgiveness.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - My Left Gator
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) uses Reginas (Wendy Raquel Robinson) sympathy to his advantage after hurting his foot moving her couch.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Goodbye, Dolly
programme.desc: Bernie makes a midnight run to retrieve Bryanas lost doll. Ice Cube guest stars as himself.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Carfool
programme.desc: Car-pool complications wreck Bernie; a boy in the car pool starts blackmailing Jordan to be his friend.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Mac Local 137
programme.desc: The kids go on strike for wages after Bernie tries to make them clean up their mess, so he hires neighborhood kids as scabs.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Jordan brings home a snake named Reggie, and sister Bryanna demands a pet, too.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Bernie Mac Dance Party
programme.desc: Vanessa fails to invite Bernie to a father-daughter dance, and it drives him crazy.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Tryptophan-tasy
programme.desc: Gluttonous Bernie has a fever dream after devouring his own personal turkey.

programme.title: Wheres the Love?
programme.desc: Two relationship experts (Lamman Rucker, Denise Boutte) try to keep up appearances when their own marriage begins to falter.

programme.title: EZ WELL Massage System - Relax, Restore, Rejuvenate -Full-Body Relief!
programme.desc: Experience the Remedy Massage System! Feel weightless and remove pressure points with zero gravity memory foam while vibration, infrared heat, and deep tissue massage work to soothe aches, boost circulation, and relax your body. Unwind And recharge!

programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Lyfes Journey
programme.desc: A family man makes a mistake that changes his life forever. Now he must start a journey to forgiveness that will bring him back to love, family and faith.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Chaos to Calm - Junior School Jumble
programme.desc: If TOP ladies had to give this school counselor a grade on organization in their school closet it would be D minus; she calls on the ladies of The Order Project for a school closet clean out and craves a system that will work for her moving forward.

programme.title: In Touch With Dr. Charles Stanley
programme.desc: Charles Stanley, pastor of the First Baptist Church in Atlanta, shares his insights on Christian faith and enlightens viewers with spiritual motivation.

programme.title: Finding Tony
programme.desc: Former NBA star Tony Greene is a depressed alcoholic whose wife is violently murdered. After getting a DUI, he begins coaching a womens college basketball team.

programme.title: City Eats: Atlanta - Bon Ton
programme.desc: Discovering the banh-mi meets poboy mash-up at this funky Viet-Cajun joint, then getting groovy at their disco chic cocktail lounge with Chef Kristol Bryant.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Common Restaurant
programme.desc: Chef Sean Freeman is not just pushing boundaries, he is redefining them; with nearly all dishes made from scratch and a kitchen that feels more like a lab of flavor, Common is chasing Michelin-level recognition in a city steeped in tradition.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Parkers Smoked Meats
programme.desc: Darrel Parker learned the art of barbecue from his father, who smoked meat for over 40 years; at Parkers, he keeps that legacy alive with dishes like lamb burgers, pork chop sandwiches and smoked turkey legs.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Simple Soul of Savannah
programme.desc: Chef Rachel Silvers is changing how we think about soul food; self-taught and driven, she puts a healthier spin on classics with dishes like meatless cabbage and collards, fried whiting and pot roast.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Narra Tree
programme.desc: A tight-knit group of Filipino friends opened Narra Tree, Savannahs first Filipino restaurant; their menu is packed with soul, oxtail kare kare and pork sisig carry stories of tradition, resilience and shared dreams.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Okan
programme.desc: Chef Bernard Bennett brings the African diaspora to fine dining with West African and Caribbean-inspired dishes, such as djon djon noodles and pork belly griot; Okan honors a legacy that Savannah knows, one of resilience, rhythm and reinvention.

programme.title: City Eats: Savannah - Klom Klom
programme.desc: In a quiet corner of Savannah, Klom Klom Thai has become a magnet for locals and celebrities alike; chef Ann Healy and PJ introduce rare Northern Thai dishes like duck Chiang Mai khao soy and boat noodles that arent easy to find.

programme.title: And Then There Was You
programme.desc: Natalie picks up the pieces of her life after her husband leaves and falls in love with a man with secrets.

programme.title: Playing Sam
programme.desc: After her ex-boyfriends acting career takes off, Samantha picks up the pieces of her broken heart and (so-called) acting career to rediscover her essence as a modern Latinx actress.

programme.title: For Richer or Poorer
programme.desc: Married couple Aubrey and Kya struggle to hold their relationship together when Aubrey loses his job and Kya has trouble coping with the change in their financial status.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The United Front
programme.desc: Bernie and Wanda strive to present a united front when disciplining the children; Wanda becomes unhappy with this strategy because shes accustomed to playing the good cop.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Sweet Life
programme.desc: Bernie circumvents his low-cholesterol diet by sneaking over to a neighbors (guest star Don Rickles) place.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Sin Cup
programme.desc: Bernie and Wanda worry about Jordans religious faith after he defaces a picture of Jesus.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Bernie Mac Rope-A-Dope
programme.desc: Bernie offends Wandas boss (Wesley Snipes) at a dinner party.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Magic Jordan
programme.desc: Jordan learns some magic tricks and uses them to charm his first crush.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Raging Election
programme.desc: Bernie calls on India.Arie to help out with Vanessas talent show.

programme.title: Not Without Hope (2025)
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as the Coast Guard launches a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: Deadlock (2021)
programme.desc: A retired Army ranger must save thousands of innocent lives when a rogue team of mercenaries brutally seizes an energy plant and holds everyone inside hostage.

programme.title: Case 39 (2009)
programme.desc: A social worker (Renee Zellweger) saves a girl (Jodelle Ferland) from abusive parents but finds there is more to the child than meets the eye.

programme.title: The Saint (1997)
programme.desc: A clever thief who is known as the master of creating false identities using the names of Catholic saints, is hired by the Russian Mafia for his next mission. But things get complicated when he falls for Emma Russel, the scientist.

programme.title: Not Without Hope (2025)
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as the Coast Guard launches a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: Fight or Flight (2024)
programme.desc: A mercenary takes on the job of tracking a high-value asset known only as "The Ghost" on an international flight. Realizing the plane is filled with assassins assigned to kill them both, the pair must work together in a fight for their lives.

programme.title: Frank Millers Sin City (2005)
programme.desc: Lawmen, prostitutes (Devon Aoki, Alexis Bledel), a hulking thug and other sordid characters run amok in a crime-ridden metropolis.

programme.title: 68 Kill (2017)
programme.desc: A hardworking mans inability to say no to a beautiful women gets him in trouble when he agrees to steal $68,000.

programme.title: Maniac (2012)
programme.desc: A serial killer (Elijah Wood) removes his victims scalps and attaches them to the vintage mannequins he restores in his late mothers shop.

programme.title: The Lookout (2007)
programme.desc: A brain-damaged former athlete (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) finds himself pulled into a heist at the bank where he works as a janitor.

programme.title: Outlaw Posse (2024)
programme.desc: In 1908 an outlaw returns from years of hiding in Mexico to claim stolen gold hidden in the hills of Montana.

programme.title: Old Guy (2024)
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn theyre being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: The Score (2001)
programme.desc: A master thief (Robert De Niro) agrees to work with a volatile partner (Edward Norton) for one last heist before he retires.

programme.title: Kindred (2025)
programme.desc: A pair of twisted, young criminals decide to break into a mansion for one big score, but they soon find out that the owners of the house are much more dangerous than they are.

programme.title: The Beldham (2024)
programme.desc: A struggling new mother fights a generations-old presence lurking within her familys home, threatening her safety, her sanity, and the life of her infant child.

programme.title: Hard Home (2024)
programme.desc: After the shocking murder of her daughter, a woman turns her high-tech home into a trap for the killer, initiating a deadly game of cat and mouse where every move can be fatal.

programme.title: Due Justice (2023)
programme.desc: Consumed by grief and driven by revenge, a former Marine embarks on a relentless mission to hunt down those responsible for the brutal murders of his beloved wife and daughter.

programme.title: The Gift (2000)

programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn theyre being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.
